# Survivability Plan

This planning note documents long-horizon survivability concepts only.

## Future Concepts

- Institutional memory preservation
- Documentation continuity
- Reviewer succession
- Recertification planning
- Governance drift prevention
- Safety scan currency review

## Non-Execution Statement

This file does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, or branch protection settings.

## Planning Review Checks

- Survivability planning remains documentation-only.
- Reviewer succession does not grant automatic authority.
- Recertification planning does not certify providers.
- Governance drift prevention does not enable runtime enforcement.
